name: spec-framework
description: Specification Driven Development framework: templates, skills, validators, and CLI for AI-agent-executable product engineering.
author: Jonatas Freire

scripts.check: node --check scripts/spec-framework.mjs && node --check scripts/init-product.mjs && node --check scripts/upgrade-product.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-product.mjs && node --check framework/validators/framework-validator.mjs && node --check framework/tests/run-tests.mjs
